variants.title: HiFi Filter OT 6248 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO58710
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter OT 6248 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO58710
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OT 6248 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO58710. Easy to install and replace, the OT 6248 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR/OIL SEPARATOR, Dimension 1 (D1): 220.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 190.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 168.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): M8X1,25, Height 1 (H1): 186.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 172.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 160.0 mm
